title: Azure Database for PostgreSQL Tutorials
summary: Learn key PostgreSQL concepts through our Azure Database for PostgreSQL Tutorials. Explore our tutorials to focus on a specific topic, or discover a subject that interest you and delve deeper.

sections.title: Azure Database for PostgreSQL Tutorials
sections.summary: Learn key PostgreSQL concepts through our Azure Database for PostgreSQL Tutorials. Explore our tutorials to focus on a specific topic, or discover a subject that interest you and delve deeper.

lessons.title: Getting started: An introduction to SQL and reading data
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to use the SQL SELECT statement in PostgreSQL to retrieve, filter, and format data with specific columns, DISTINCT, and expressions.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/azure-databases/postgresql/basic-sql-simple-select/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Getting started: An introduction to SQL and reading data

lessons.title: Filtering data: The WHERE clause and subqueries
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to filter data in PostgreSQL using the WHERE clause, logical operators, pattern matching, and subqueries for advanced query control.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/azure-databases/postgresql/basic-sql-where-clause-subqueries/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Filtering data: The WHERE clause and subqueries

lessons.title: Organizing data: Using LIMIT, OFFSET, and ORDER BY clauses
lessons.content_md:
Learn to control the size and order of query results in PostgreSQL with the LIMIT, OFFSET, and ORDER BY clauses. Master pagination, sorting, and optimizing performance with these essential SQL tools.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/azure-databases/postgresql/basic-sql-limit-offset-order-by/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Organizing data: Using LIMIT, OFFSET, and ORDER BY clauses

lessons.title: Combining data from multiple tables: SQL Joins Explained
lessons.content_md:
Combine data across multiple PostgreSQL tables using SQL JOINs. Learn INNER, LEFT, RIGHT, FULL OUTER, and NATURAL joins with real examples.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/azure-databases/postgresql/basic-sql-join-tables/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Combining data from multiple tables: SQL Joins Explained

lessons.title: Summarizing data: Aggregate functions and grouping
lessons.content_md:
Analyze data in PostgreSQL with aggregate functions and grouping. Learn COUNT, SUM, AVG, and filter results using GROUP BY and HAVING.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/azure-databases/postgresql/basic-sql-aggregate-functions-grouping/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Summarizing data: Aggregate functions and grouping

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Azure Database for PostgreSQL Tutorials
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Azure Database for PostgreSQL Tutorials**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
